实现一个功能：popup里每一个功能区域块都有一个上调、下调按钮，有一个维护这个顺序的数组（类似的东西我随便说的），这样用户可以自己决定popup里的功能顺序（越常用的越靠上）

Explore the popup UI structure in this Chrome extension project. I need to understand:

1. The main popup page component (likely in `src/pages/popup/`)
2. How feature sections/blocks are organized in the popup
3. What components represent each "section" or "feature area"
4. How the popup renders these sections (is it a list? hardcoded order?)
5. Any existing storage keys related to popup settings in `src/core/types/common.ts`

Be very thorough - read the main popup component files, look at all the section/block components, and understand the rendering order. Also check `src/pages/popup/components/` for all section components.

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have all the information needed. Let me create a comprehensive report. ## Popup UI Structure - Complete Analysis I've thoroughly explored the popup UI structure for the Gemini Voyager Chrome extension. Here's what I found: ### Main Entry Points **File Structure:** - `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/src/pages/popup/index.tsx` - Entry point (renders `` wrapper) - `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/src/pages/popup/Popup.tsx` - Main popup component (2165 lines) - `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/src/pages/popup/index.html` - HTML template - `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/src/pages/popup/index.css` - Basic styles --- ### Section/Feature Components (in `src/pages/popup/components/`) All components are standalone and reusable: 1. **CloudSyncSettings.tsx** - Google Drive cloud sync configuration - Export: `export function CloudSyncSettings()` - Contains: sync state, upload/download controls, account isolation detection - Hidden on Safari (API limitations) 2. **ContextSyncSettings.tsx** - IDE context sync configuration - Export: `export function ContextSyncSettings()` - Contains: sync mode toggle, port configuration, connection check, sync button 3. **KeyboardShortcutSettings.tsx** - Keyboard shortcut configuration - Export: `export function KeyboardShortcutSettings()` - Contains: enabled toggle, shortcut recording (previous/next actions) 4. **StarredHistory.tsx** - Starred messages viewer - Export: `export function StarredHistory({ onClose })` - Used as modal replacement (renders full popup instead of section) - Contains: starred messages list, delete functionality, navigation 5. **WidthSlider.tsx** - Reusable slider component - Export: `export default function WidthSlider({...})` - Used for: Chat Width, Edit Input Width, Sidebar Width, Folder Spacing, Folder Tree Indent - Props: label, value, min/max, step, narrow/wide labels, optional toggle 6. **WebsiteLogos.tsx** - Icon SVG exports (8 AI service icons) - Exports: `IconChatGPT`, `IconClaude`, `IconGrok`, `IconDeepSeek`, `IconQwen`, `IconKimi`, `IconMidjourney`, `IconNotebookLM` - Used in Prompt Manager custom websites section --- ### Popup Rendering Order (in Popup.tsx) The popup has a **fixed vertical layout** with sections ordered like this: ```
{/* Header: Logo + Dark Mode Toggle + Language Switcher */}
{/* Main scrollable content area */} 1. Update Notification Card (conditional - if hasUpdate) 2. AI Studio Master Toggle (conditional - if isAIStudio platform) 3. CloudSyncSettings Component (conditional - !isSafariBrowser) 4. ContextSyncSettings Component 5. Timeline Options Card - Scroll Mode toggle (flow/jump) - Hide Container toggle - Draggable Timeline toggle - Marker Level toggle - Show Message Timestamps toggle - Prevent Auto Scroll toggle 6. Folder Options Card - Folder Enabled toggle - Hide Archived Conversations toggle - Copy Folder Structure for AI button - Fork Enabled toggle 7. Width Sliders (Sidebar Auto-Hide + Visual Effects) Card - Sidebar Auto-Hide toggle (Gemini-only) - Sidebar Full-Hide toggle (Gemini-only) 8. Visual Effect Card (Gemini-only) - Off / Snow / Sakura / Rain buttons 9. Formula Copy Format Card - Radio buttons: LaTeX, UnicodeMath, NoDollar 10. KeyboardShortcutSettings Component 11. Input Collapse Options Card - Enable Input Collapse toggle - Allow Collapse When Not Empty toggle (nested, conditional) - Ctrl+Enter Send toggle 12. Prompt Manager Options Card - Hide Prompt Manager toggle - Custom Websites section: - Website logos (ChatGPT, Claude, Grok, DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi) - Add website input + button - Remove website buttons for each 13. General Options Card - Tab Title Update toggle - Mermaid Rendering toggle - Quote Reply toggle 14. Nanobanana Options Card (!isSafariBrowser) - Watermark Remover toggle
{/* Footer: Version info + Links + GitHub Star Button */}
``` **Width:** Fixed 360px (w-[360px]) **Rendering:** All sections use `` wrapper from UI components library **Conditional Platform Logic:** - Some sections hidden on Safari (CloudSync, Nanobanana, Visual Effects) - Some sections only show on AI Studio platform (toggle at top) - Some sections Gemini-only (Sidebar Auto/Full Hide, Visual Effects) --- ### Storage Keys (from `src/core/types/common.ts`) Popup-related settings stored: ```typescript // Timeline TIMELINE_SCROLL_MODE: 'geminiTimelineScrollMode' TIMELINE_HIDE_CONTAINER: 'geminiTimelineHideContainer' TIMELINE_DRAGGABLE: 'geminiTimelineDraggable' TIMELINE_POSITION: 'geminiTimelinePosition' TIMELINE_STARRED_MESSAGES: 'geminiTimelineStarredMessages' TIMELINE_SHORTCUTS: 'geminiTimelineShortcuts' // UI customization CHAT_WIDTH: 'geminiChatWidth' // Prompt Manager PROMPT_ITEMS: 'gvPromptItems' PROMPT_PANEL_LOCKED: 'gvPromptPanelLocked' PROMPT_PANEL_POSITION: 'gvPromptPanelPosition' PROMPT_TRIGGER_POSITION: 'gvPromptTriggerPosition' PROMPT_CUSTOM_WEBSITES: 'gvPromptCustomWebsites' PROMPT_THEME: 'gvPromptTheme' // Global settings LANGUAGE: 'language' FORMULA_COPY_FORMAT: 'gvFormulaCopyFormat' // Input behavior CTRL_ENTER_SEND: 'gvCtrlEnterSend' INPUT_COLLAPSE_ENABLED: 'gvInputCollapseEnabled' INPUT_COLLAPSE_WHEN_NOT_EMPTY: 'gvInputCollapseWhenNotEmpty' // Default Model DEFAULT_MODEL: 'gvDefaultModel' // Account Isolation GV_ACCOUNT_ISOLATION_ENABLED: 'gvAccountIsolationEnabled' GV_ACCOUNT_ISOLATION_ENABLED_GEMINI: 'gvAccountIsolationEnabledGemini' GV_ACCOUNT_ISOLATION_ENABLED_AISTUDIO: 'gvAccountIsolationEnabledAIStudio' // Sidebar behavior GV_SIDEBAR_AUTO_HIDE: 'gvSidebarAutoHide' GV_SIDEBAR_FULL_HIDE: 'gvSidebarFullHide' // Folder spacing GV_FOLDER_SPACING: 'gvFolderSpacing' GV_AISTUDIO_FOLDER_SPACING: 'gvAIStudioFolderSpacing' GV_FOLDER_TREE_INDENT: 'gvFolderTreeIndent' // Visual effects GV_VISUAL_EFFECT: 'gvVisualEffect' // 'off' | 'snow' | 'sakura' | 'rain' // Message timestamps GV_SHOW_MESSAGE_TIMESTAMPS: 'gvShowMessageTimestamps' GV_MESSAGE_TIMESTAMPS: 'gvMessageTimestamps' // Changelog, Fork, AI Studio CHANGELOG_DISMISSED_VERSION: 'gvChangelogDismissedVersion' FORK_ENABLED: 'gvForkEnabled' GV_AISTUDIO_ENABLED: 'gvAIStudioEnabled' ``` --- ### Key Implementation Details **Component State Management:** - Popup.tsx uses `useState` for all settings (~30+ state variables) - `apply()` callback handles syncing all changes to `chrome.storage.sync` - Uses `useEffect` for initial load from storage **Width 2. How feature sections/blocks are organized in the popup
3. What components represent each "section" or "feature area"

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have all the information needed. Let me create a comprehensive report. ## Popup UI Structure - Complete Analysis I've thoroughly explored the popup UI structure for the Gemini Voyager Chrome extension. Here's what I found: ### Main Entry Points **File Structure:** - `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/src/pages/popup/index.tsx` - Entry point (renders `` wrapper) - `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/src/pages/popup/Popup.tsx` - Main popup component (2165 lines) - `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/src/pages/popup/index.html` - HTML template - `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/src/pages/popup/index.css` - Basic styles --- ### Section/Feature Components (in `src/pages/popup/components/`) All components are standalone and reusable: 1. **CloudSyncSettings.tsx** - Google Drive cloud sync configuration - Export: `export function CloudSyncSettings()` - Contains: sync state, upload/download controls, account isolation detection - Hidden on Safari (API limitations) 2. **ContextSyncSettings.tsx** - IDE context sync configuration - Export: `export function ContextSyncSettings()` - Contains: sync mode toggle, port configuration, connection check, sync button 3. **KeyboardShortcutSettings.tsx** - Keyboard shortcut configuration - Export: `export function KeyboardShortcutSettings()` - Contains: enabled toggle, shortcut recording (previous/next actions) 4. **StarredHistory.tsx** - Starred messages viewer - Export: `export function StarredHistory({ onClose })` - Used as modal replacement (renders full popup instead of section) - Contains: starred messages list, delete functionality, navigation 5. **WidthSlider.tsx** - Reusable slider component - Export: `export default function WidthSlider({...})` - Used for: Chat Width, Edit Input Width, Sidebar Width, Folder Spacing, Folder Tree Indent - Props: label, value, min/max, step, narrow/wide labels, optional toggle 6. **WebsiteLogos.tsx** - Icon SVG exports (8 AI service icons) - Exports: `IconChatGPT`, `IconClaude`, `IconGrok`, `IconDeepSeek`, `IconQwen`, `IconKimi`, `IconMidjourney`, `IconNotebookLM` - Used in Prompt Manager custom websites section --- ### Popup Rendering Order (in Popup.tsx) The popup has a **fixed vertical layout** with sections ordered like this: ```
{/* Header: Logo + Dark Mode Toggle + Language Switcher */}
{/* Main scrollable content area */} 1. Update Notification Card (conditional - if hasUpdate) 2. AI Studio Master Toggle (conditional - if isAIStudio platform) 3. CloudSyncSettings Component (conditional - !isSafariBrowser) 4. ContextSyncSettings Component 5. Timeline Options Card - Scroll Mode toggle (flow/jump) - Hide Container toggle - Draggable Timeline toggle - Marker Level toggle - Show Message Timestamps toggle - Prevent Auto Scroll toggle 6. Folder Options Card - Folder Enabled toggle - Hide Archived Conversations toggle - Copy Folder Structure for AI button - Fork Enabled toggle 7. Width Sliders (Sidebar Auto-Hide + Visual Effects) Card - Sidebar Auto-Hide toggle (Gemini-only) - Sidebar Full-Hide toggle (Gemini-only) 8. Visual Effect Card (Gemini-only) - Off / Snow / Sakura / Rain buttons 9. Formula Copy Format Card - Radio buttons: LaTeX, UnicodeMath, NoDollar 10. KeyboardShortcutSettings Component 11. Input Collapse Options Card - Enable Input Collapse toggle - Allow Collapse When Not Empty toggle (nested, conditional) - Ctrl+Enter Send toggle 12. Prompt Manager Options Card - Hide Prompt Manager toggle - Custom Websites section: - Website logos (ChatGPT, Claude, Grok, DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi) - Add website input + button - Remove website buttons for each 13. General Options Card - Tab Title Update toggle - Mermaid Rendering toggle - Quote Reply toggle 14. Nanobanana Options Card (!isSafariBrowser) - Watermark Remover toggle
{/* Footer: Version info + Links + GitHub Star Button */}
``` **Width:** Fixed 360px (w-[360px]) **Rendering:** All sections use `` wrapper from UI components library **Conditional Platform Logic:** - Some sections hidden on Safari (CloudSync, Nanobanana, Visual Effects) - Some sections only show on AI Studio platform (toggle at top) - Some sections Gemini-only (Sidebar Auto/Full Hide, Visual Effects) --- ### Storage Keys (from `src/core/types/common.ts`) Popup-related settings stored: ```typescript // Timeline TIMELINE_SCROLL_MODE: 'geminiTimelineScrollMode' TIMELINE_HIDE_CONTAINER: 'geminiTimelineHideContainer' TIMELINE_DRAGGABLE: 'geminiTimelineDraggable' TIMELINE_POSITION: 'geminiTimelinePosition' TIMELINE_STARRED_MESSAGES: 'geminiTimelineStarredMessages' TIMELINE_SHORTCUTS: 'geminiTimelineShortcuts' // UI customization CHAT_WIDTH: 'geminiChatWidth' // Prompt Manager PROMPT_ITEMS: 'gvPromptItems' PROMPT_PANEL_LOCKED: 'gvPromptPanelLocked' PROMPT_PANEL_POSITION: 'gvPromptPanelPosition' PROMPT_TRIGGER_POSITION: 'gvPromptTriggerPosition' PROMPT_CUSTOM_WEBSITES: 'gvPromptCustomWebsites' PROMPT_THEME: 'gvPromptTheme' // Global settings LANGUAGE: 'language' FORMULA_COPY_FORMAT: 'gvFormulaCopyFormat' // Input behavior CTRL_ENTER_SEND: 'gvCtrlEnterSend' INPUT_COLLAPSE_ENABLED: 'gvInputCollapseEnabled' INPUT_COLLAPSE_WHEN_NOT_EMPTY: 'gvInputCollapseWhenNotEmpty' // Default Model DEFAULT_MODEL: 'gvDefaultModel' // Account Isolation GV_ACCOUNT_ISOLATION_ENABLED: 'gvAccountIsolationEnabled' GV_ACCOUNT_ISOLATION_ENABLED_GEMINI: 'gvAccountIsolationEnabledGemini' GV_ACCOUNT_ISOLATION_ENABLED_AISTUDIO: 'gvAccountIsolationEnabledAIStudio' // Sidebar behavior GV_SIDEBAR_AUTO_HIDE: 'gvSidebarAutoHide' GV_SIDEBAR_FULL_HIDE: 'gvSidebarFullHide' // Folder spacing GV_FOLDER_SPACING: 'gvFolderSpacing' GV_AISTUDIO_FOLDER_SPACING: 'gvAIStudioFolderSpacing' GV_FOLDER_TREE_INDENT: 'gvFolderTreeIndent' // Visual effects GV_VISUAL_EFFECT: 'gvVisualEffect' // 'off' | 'snow' | 'sakura' | 'rain' // Message timestamps GV_SHOW_MESSAGE_TIMESTAMPS: 'gvShowMessageTimestamps' GV_MESSAGE_TIMESTAMPS: 'gvMessageTimestamps' // Changelog, Fork, AI Studio CHANGELOG_DISMISSED_VERSION: 'gvChangelogDismissedVersion' FORK_ENABLED: 'gvForkEnabled' GV_AISTUDIO_ENABLED: 'gvAIStudioEnabled' ``` --- ### Key Implementation Details **Component State Management:** - Popup.tsx uses `useState` for all settings (~30+ state variables) - `apply()` callback handles syncing all changes to `chrome.storage.sync` - Uses `useEffect` for initial load from storage **Width Adjusters:** - Custom hook `useWidthAdjuster()` for dynamic slider management - Supports both percentage (Gemini) and pixel (AI Studio) values - Legacy migration from px to percentage format **Platform Detection:** - Active tab URL detection (gemini.google.com vs aistudio.google.com) - Account isolation service integration - Safari detection via `isSafari()` utility **Conditional Rendering:** - Safari browser hides: Cloud Sync, Nanobanana, Visual Effects - AI Studio platform shows different settings than Gemini - Nested conditionals for dependent toggles **Modal State:** - StarredHistory replaces entire popup content (line 1067-1069) - Returns early if `showStarredHistory === true` --- ### Material Symbols Icons Currently loaded in `index.html`: ```html ``` Only 3 icons loaded: `check`, `content_copy`, `experiment` --- ### Absolute File Paths - `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/src/pages/popup/Popup.tsx` - 1. Store section order in `chrome.storage.sync`

3. Add up/down arrow buttons (visible on hover) to each section
4. Use a `wrapSection()` helper to minimize boilerplate

Let me start with the infrastructure changes in parallel.

```json
  "moveSectionUp": {
    "message": "TRANSLATION_HERE",
    "description": "Tooltip for moving a settings section up in popup"
  },
  "moveSectionDown": {
    "message": "TRANSLATION_HERE",
    "description": "Tooltip for moving a settings section down in popup"
  }
```

To add these, find the LAST key-value pair in each JSON file (it ends with `}` without a trailing comma), add a comma after it, then add the two new entries before the final closing `}`.

content.text: Everything passes. Let me do a final review of the key parts of the implementation to make sure the logic is correct.

The implementation looks correct. Let me summarize what was implemented:

## Summary

**Feature**: Popup section reordering - users can customize the order of settings sections in the popup.

**How it works**:
1. **17 reorderable sections** defined as `PopupSectionId` constants (cloudSync, contextSync, timeline, folder, folderSpacing, etc.)
2. **Section order** stored in `chrome.storage.sync` via `gvPopupSectionOrder` key
3. **CSS `order` + flexbox** used to visually reorder sections without DOM restructuring
4. **Up/down arrow buttons** appear on hover (top-right corner of each section) via `SectionReorderControls` component
5. **Hidden sections** (Safari-only, AI Studio-only) are properly skipped during swap operations
6. **Backward compatible** - new sections are automatically appended to stored order, removed sections are ignored

**Files changed**:
- `src/core/types/common.ts` - Added `GV_POPUP_SECTION_ORDER` storage key
- `src/pages/popup/Popup.tsx` - Added section IDs, reorder controls, `wrapSection()` helper, CSS flexbox layout
- `src/locales/*/messages.json` (all 10) - Added `moveSectionUp` / `moveSectionDown` i18n keys

**Verification**: typecheck, lint (0 errors), 606 tests pass, Chrome build succeeds.
[Request interrupted by user]

**实现了 Popup 设置面板的自定义排序功能。**

每个功能区域块（共 17 个）在鼠标悬停时右上角会出现 ▲/▼ 按钮，用户点击即可上下移动该区域，顺序自动保存到 `chrome.storage.sync`，下次打开 popup 恢复。

**技术方案**：
- 父容器改为 `flex flex-col`，每个区域用 `wrapSection(id, content)` 包裹，通过 CSS `order` 属性控制视觉顺序
- 条件隐藏的区域（Safari 不显示 CloudSync/Nanobanana，AI Studio 不显示 Sidebar/VisualEffect 等）在 swap 时会自动跳过
- 新版本新增的区域会自动追加到已保存顺序的末尾，向后兼容

1→# 随心所欲 2→ 3→默认的已经很好。但我们要的是完美。 4→你的地盘，你做主。 5→ 6→## 影院模式 7→ 8→为什么要透过门缝看世界？ 9→把聊天框拉大。 10→ 11→- **宽屏**：1400px。写代码、看大表，视野全开。 12→- **专注**：800px。沉浸阅读，心无旁骛。 13→- **随意**：拖动滑块，你觉得多宽舒服，就多宽。 14→ 15→## 掌控 16→ 17→点插件图标，进控制台。 18→ 19→- **滚动**：自然顺滑，还是经典手感？ 20→- **位置**：时间轴放哪顺手，就放哪。 21→- **视觉特效**：可切换 `飘雪`、`樱花`、`雨`，给页面加一点氛围感。 22→ 23→## 氛围感 24→ 25→Voyager 不只是在做效率增强，也允许你顺手把页面气质调对。 26→ 27→- **飘雪**：轻柔雪花缓慢飘落，适合安静阅读。 28→- **樱花**：花瓣自然飘散，页面会更轻盈。 29→- **雨**：电影感雨丝与细微水花，整体更有沉浸感。 30→- **平滑切换**：关闭特效或切换到另一种效果时，粒子会自然退场，不会突然消失。 31→ 32→

1→# 时间旅行
     2→
     3→长对话是灾难。上上下下，找不着北。
     4→Voyager 把对话变成一条线。
     5→
     6→## 看见节奏
     7→
     8→看屏幕右侧。
     9→每个点都是一句话。那是你对话的脉搏。
    10→
    11→## 导航，一步到位
    12→
    13→- **瞬移**：点哪去哪，绝不拖泥带水。
    14→- **偷看**：鼠标放上去，不用跳转也能看内容。
    15→- **插眼**：长按节点 **加星**。给大脑打个书签。
    16→- **层级 (实验性)**：右键点击节点，设置不同层级（1-3 级）或折叠子节点。让深度分支对话一目了然。
    17→- **快捷键**：用键盘飞速穿梭。默认 `j`/`k` 上下跳转，想改就改。
    18→
    19→![时间轴导航](/assets/teaser.png)
    20→
    21→## 键盘，更快
    22→
    23→不想用鼠标？用键盘。
    24→
    25→**就像在 Gemini 里开了 Vim Mode。**
    26→
    27→### 默认快捷键
    28→
    29→- `k` - 跳到上一个节点
    30→- `j` - 跳到下一个节点
    31→
    32→### 自定义
    33→
    34→打开扩展设置，点击快捷键框，按下你想用的键。
    35→任意键，任意组合。`n`/`p`？`,`/`.`？随你。
    36→
    37→**流动模式**下连按会排队播放动画。
    38→**跳跃模式**下立即响应，速度拉满。
    39→

1→# 默认模型 2→ 3→::: info 4→**注意**：该功能仅在 1.1.9 及后续版本中支持。 5→::: 6→ 7→为 Gemini™ 添加设置默认模型的功能，避免每次开启新对话时都需要手动切换。 8→ 9→
10→ 11→
12→ 13→## 功能特点 14→ 15→- **交互式设置**：在 Gemini 的模型选择菜单中直接注入“星标”按钮。 16→- **自动切换**：开启新对话时，插件会自动为您切换到预设的默认模型。 17→- **持久化保存**：您的偏好会被保存，跨设备同步（如果开启了插件同步）。 18→- **优化体验**：针对单页应用（SPA）优化，无论是点击“新对话”按钮、快捷键还是直接访问 `/app` 路径，均能准确触发。 19→ 20→## 如何使用 21→ 22→1. 点击 Gemini 输入框上方的**模型选择器**。 23→2. 鼠标悬停在您想要设为默认的模型上，点击出现的**空心星标**。 24→3. 星标变为**实心**后，该模型即被设为默认。 25→4. 下次访问首页或发起新对话时，系统会自动为您选中该模型。 26→5. 如需取消，再次点击实心星标即可。 27→

1→# Time Travel
     2→
     3→Long conversations are messy. You scroll up, you scroll down, you lose your place.
     4→Voyager turns your conversation into a timeline.
     5→
     6→## See the Shape of Your Chat
     7→
     8→Look at the right side of your screen.
     9→Each node represents a message. The timeline visualizes the rhythm of your dialogue.
    10→
    11→## Navigation, Solved.
    12→
    13→- **Teleport**: Click a node to jump instantly to that message.
    14→- **Peek**: Hover to see what's inside without moving.
    15→- **Bookmark**: Long-press a node to **Star** it. It's like a bookmark for your brain.
    16→- **Levels (Experimental)**: Right-click a node to set various levels (1-3) or collapse children. Perfect for making branched conversations clear.
    17→- **Keyboard**: Navigate at the speed of thought. Default `j`/`k`, customize to anything.
    18→
    19→![Timeline Navigation](/assets/teaser.png)
    20→
    21→## Even Faster with Keys
    22→
    23→Don't want to use the mouse? Use your keyboard.
    24→
    25→**It's like turning on Vim mode in Gemini.**
    26→
    27→### Default Shortcuts
    28→
    29→- `k` - Jump to previous node
    30→- `j` - Jump to next node
    31→
    32→### Customize It
    33→
    34→Open extension settings, click a shortcut box, press any key you want.
    35→Any key, any combo. `n`/`p`? `,`/`.`? Your call.
    36→
    37→**Flow mode**: Rapid presses queue up smoothly.
    38→**Jump mode**: Instant response, max speed.
    39→

Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the VitePress documentation site. Let me provide you with a detailed summary.

## VitePress Documentation Site - Complete Overview

### 1. **Location & Structure**

The docs are located at `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/docs/`

```
docs/
├── .vitepress/                 # VitePress configuration
│   ├── config.mts             # Main VitePress config (1000+ lines, 10 locales)
│   ├── theme/                 # Custom theme components
│   │   ├── components/        # React/Vue theme components
│   │   ├── index.ts
│   │   └── style.css
│   ├── dist/                  # Built output
│   └── cache/
├── guide/                      # Shared guide source (Chinese, single source)
│   ├── batch-delete.md
│   ├── cloud-sync.md
│   ├── default-model.md       # Includes version info + feature highlights
│   ├── export.md
│   ├── folders.md             # Detailed with subsections & images
│   ├── settings.md            # Popup settings doc (Chinese: "随心所欲")
│   ├── timeline.md            # Timeline feature doc
│   └── [24 other feature docs]
├── index.md                    # Homepage (Chinese, layout: home)
├── privacy.md
├── public/assets/              # Images, videos, SVGs
│   ├── *.png
│   ├── *.mp4
│   └── sponsors.svg
├── en/                         # English locale
│   ├── index.md               # Homepage (English)
│   ├── guide/                 # Translated guides
│   └── [shared structure]
├── zh_TW/                      # Traditional Chinese
├── ja/                         # Japanese
├── ko/                         # Korean
├── fr/                         # French
├── es/                         # Spanish
├── pt/                         # Portuguese
├── ru/                         # Russian
└── ar/                         # Arabic (RTL)
```

### 2. **Sidebar/Nav Configuration**

The sidebar is **centralized in `/docs/.vitepress/config.mts`** and configured per-locale as a hierarchical structure with 3 main sections:

**For Chinese (root locale) - lines 20-62:**
1. **启程** (Getting Started)
   - 安装, 快速上手, 赞助, 交流与反馈
2. **通用功能 (Gemini & AI Studio)**
   - 文件夹, 灵感库, 云同步, 公式复制, 侧边栏宽度
3. **Gemini 专属功能** (17 items)
   - 时间轴, 对话导出, 引用回复, 对话宽度调整, etc.

**Same structure exists for all 10 locales** (en, zh_TW, ja, ko, fr, es, pt, ru, ar), with localized nav labels and footer messages.

### 3. **Existing Feature Documentation Pages**

All feature docs are in `/docs/guide/` and referenced in the sidebar config. Key characteristics:

**Structure Pattern:**
- **Title**: Markdown H1 (e.g., `# 时间旅行`)
- **Intro**: 1-2 sentence tagline describing the feature
- **Sections**: H2-H3 hierarchy with bullet lists and images
- **Media**: Relative paths to `/assets/` directory (PNG images, MP4 videos)
- **Info boxes**: VitePress `::: info` syntax for version/note callouts (e.g., in `default-model.md`)
- **HTML**: Inline flex layouts for side-by-side images with custom styling

**Example: `settings.md` (Chat Width Adjustment)**
```markdown
# 随心所欲
默认的已经很好。但我们要的是完美。
你的地盘，你做主。

## 影院模式
为什么要透过门缝看世界？把聊天框拉大。
- **宽屏**: 1400px...
- **专注**: 800px...
- **随意**: 拖动滑块...

## 掌控
点插件图标，进控制台。
- **滚动**: 自然顺滑...
- **位置**: 时间轴放哪...
- **视觉特效**: 可切换 `飘雪`、`樱花`、`雨`

[inline HTML with images]
```

**Example: `timeline.md` (Timeline Navigation)**
- Poetic title: "时间旅行" (Time Travel)
- Features: navigation, keyboard shortcuts, customization
- Default keys: `j`/`k`, customizable
- Includes experimental level system

**Example: `folders.md` (Folder Organization)**
- 4 major sections with subsections
- Feature showcase with side-by-side Gemini + AI Studio images
- Advanced features: color customization, account isolation, AI auto-organize
- Platform-specific notes (Safari limitations)
- Step-by-step instructions with screenshot references

### 4. **Language & Writing Style**

**Primary Language:** **Simplified Chinese** (root locale)
- **Tone**: Poetic, conversational, casual
- **Examples**: 
  - "长对话是灾难。上上下下，找不着北。" (Long chats are disaster. Up and down, lost at sea.)
  - "整理的直觉" (The Intuition of Organization)
  - "绝招" (Killer Tricks)

**Translations:** Full **10-language support**
- English translations are not word-for-word; they capture the spirit
- Each locale has its own `/locale/guide/` folder with translated versions
- config.mts has localized nav/footer for each language

### 5. **Popup Settings Documentation**

The **"Settings" page** (`settings.md`) documents popup settings:
- **Path**: `/docs/guide/settings.md` → configured as `/guide/settings` in sidebar
- **Location in Config**: Line 46 (Chinese), line 166 (English)
- **Title in Chinese**: "对话宽度调整" → in English: "Chat Width Adjustment"
- **Cover Features**:
  1. **Chat Width**: Three presets (1400px wide, 800px focused, custom slider)
  2. **Scroll Mode**: Natural vs. classic
  3. **Timeline Position**: Draggable placement
  4. **Visual Effects**: Snow/Sakura/Rain atmospheric effects
- **Media**: 2 screenshot images (open settings, adjust width)

### 6. **Key Conventions**

- **Image paths**: All relative, like `/assets/gemini-folders.png`
- **Videos**: MP4 files with `autoplay loop muted playsinline` attributes
- **Styling**: Inline HTML flex layouts for responsive design
- **Version callouts**: `::: info` boxes for version-specific notes
- **Markdown support**: Standard Markdown with HTML blocks for complex layouts
- **Nav structure**: Text labels map exactly to links in sidebar config
- **Asset management**: Single `/public/assets/` directory shared across all locales

This is a **well-organized, multi-language documentation system** with Chinese as the source language and programmatic sidebar/nav management via VitePress config.

file.content:
# 随心所欲 默认的已经很好。但我们要的是完美。 你的地盘，你做主。 ## 影院模式 为什么要透过门缝看世界？ 把聊天框拉大。 - **宽屏**：1400px。写代码、看大表，视野全开。 - **专注**：800px。沉浸阅读，心无旁骛。 - **随意**：拖动滑块，你觉得多宽舒服，就多宽。 ## 掌控 点插件图标，进控制台。 - **滚动**：自然顺滑，还是经典手感？ - **位置**：时间轴放哪顺手，就放哪。 - **视觉特效**：可切换 `飘雪`、`樱花`、`雨`，给页面加一点氛围感。 ## 氛围感 Voyager 不只是在做效率增强，也允许你顺手把页面气质调对。 - **飘雪**：轻柔雪花缓慢飘落，适合安静阅读。 - **樱花**：花瓣自然飘散，页面会更轻盈。 - **雨**：电影感雨丝与细微水花，整体更有沉浸感。 - **平滑切换**：关闭特效或切换到另一种效果时，粒子会自然退场，不会突然消失。

打开设置

调整视野

You can also change the mood of the page. 26→ 27→- **Snow**: Soft drifting flakes for a calm winter feel. 28→- **Sakura**: Floating cherry blossom petals for a lighter spring vibe. 29→- **Rain**: A cinematic rain overlay with angled streaks and subtle splash ripples. 30→- **Smooth switching**: Turning an effect off or switching to another one lets existing particles fade out naturally. 31→ 32→

file.content:
# Make It Yours The default experience is great. But you might want it perfect. Customize every pixel. ## Cinema Mode Why view the future through a tiny keyhole? Voyager lets you expand the chat width. - **Wide**: 1400px for coding and complex tables. - **Focused**: 800px for reading. - **You decide**: Use the slider to find your sweet spot. ## Control Click the extension icon to access the control center. - **Scroll Mode**: Natural or classic. - **Timeline Position**: Put it where it feels right. - **Visual Effects**: Pick `Snow`, `Sakura`, or `Rain` for a seasonal atmosphere. ## Atmosphere Voyager is not limited to utility tweaks. You can also change the mood of the page. - **Snow**: Soft drifting flakes for a calm winter feel. - **Sakura**: Floating cherry blossom petals for a lighter spring vibe. - **Rain**: A cinematic rain overlay with angled streaks and subtle splash ripples. - **Smooth switching**: Turning an effect off or switching to another one lets existing particles fade out naturally.

Open Settings

Adjust Width

content.text: 这个功能适合加在 `settings.md` 里，因为它属于"控制台/Popup 设置"范畴。在"掌控"章节下新增即可。

input.old_string: ## 氛围感
input.new_string:
## 自定义排序

控制台里的功能区域太多，常用的被埋在下面？

鼠标悬停在任意功能卡片上，右上角会出现 ▲/▼ 按钮。点一下，卡片就会上移或下移。调整后的顺序自动保存，下次打开还是你的布局。

## 氛围感

input.prompt:
Add a "Custom Order" section to the settings.md file in each of these 8 locale directories. The section should be inserted BEFORE the "Atmosphere" equivalent section (the 3rd H2 heading in each file).

For each file, read it first to find the correct H2 heading to insert before, then use Edit to add the new section.

The content pattern is:
```
## [Localized Title]

[1 sentence: problem description]

[1 sentence: hover to see arrows, click to move. Layout saved automatically.]

```

Here are the files and translations:

1. `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/docs/zh_TW/guide/settings.md`
   - Title: 自訂排序
   - Body: 控制台裡的功能區塊太多，常用的被埋在下面？\n\n滑鼠懸停在任意功能卡片上，右上角會出現 ▲/▼ 按鈕。點一下，卡片就會上移或下移。調整後的順序自動保存，下次打開還是你的佈局。

2. `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/docs/ja/guide/settings.md`
   - Title: カスタム並び替え
   - Body: ポップアップの設定項目が多すぎて、よく使うものが下に埋もれていませんか？\n\n設定カードにマウスを合わせると、右上に ▲/▼ ボタンが表示されます。クリックでカードを上下に移動でき、並び順は自動保存されます。

3. `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/docs/ko/guide/settings.md`
   - Title: 사용자 정의 순서
   - Body: 팝업에 설정 항목이 너무 많아 자주 쓰는 것이 아래에 묻혀 있나요?\n\n설정 카드에 마우스를 올리면 오른쪽 상단에 ▲/▼ 버튼이 나타납니다. 클릭하면 카드가 위아래로 이동하며, 순서는 자동 저장됩니다.

4. `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/docs/fr/guide/settings.md`
   - Title: Ordre personnalisé
   - Body: Trop de sections dans le popup et celles que vous utilisez le plus sont tout en bas ?\n\nSurvol une carte de paramètres pour voir les boutons ▲/▼ en haut à droite. Cliquez pour déplacer une carte vers le haut ou le bas. Votre disposition est sauvegardée automatiquement.

5. `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/docs/es/guide/settings.md`
   - Title: Orden personalizado
   - Body: ¿Demasiadas secciones en el popup y las que más usas están enterradas al fondo?\n\nPasa el ratón sobre cualquier tarjeta de configuración y aparecerán los botones ▲/▼ en la esquina superior derecha. Haz clic para mover una tarjeta arriba o abajo. Tu disposición se guarda automáticamente.

6. `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/docs/pt/guide/settings.md`
   - Title: Ordem personalizada
   - Body: Muitas seções no popup e as que você mais usa estão lá embaixo?\n\nPasse o mouse sobre qualquer cartão de configuração e os botões ▲/▼ aparecerão no canto superior direito. Clique para mover um cartão para cima ou para baixo. Sua disposição é salva automaticamente.

7. `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/docs/ru/guide/settings.md`
   - Title: Пользовательский порядок
   - Body: Слишком много секций в попапе, а нужные оказались внизу?\n\nНаведите курсор на любую карточку настроек — в правом верхнем углу появятся кнопки ▲/▼. Нажмите, чтобы переместить карточку вверх или вниз. Порядок сохраняется автоматически.

8. `/Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/docs/ar/guide/settings.md`
   - Title: ترتيب مخصص
   - Body: هل يوجد أقسام كثيرة في النافذة المنبثقة والأقسام التي تستخدمها أكثر مدفونة في الأسفل؟\n\nمرر الماوس فوق أي بطاقة إعدادات وستظهر أزرار ▲/▼ في الزاوية العلوية اليمنى. انقر لتحريك البطاقة لأعلى أو لأسفل. يتم حفظ ترتيبك تلقائيًا.

IMPORTANT: Read each file first, find the 3rd H2 heading (the "Atmosphere" equivalent), and insert the new section BEFORE it. The new section should have a blank line before and after the H2 heading.

1→# 隨心所欲 2→ 3→默認的已經很好。但我們要的是完美。 4→你的地盤，你做主。 5→ 6→## 影院模式 7→ 8→為什麼要透過門縫看世界？ 9→把聊天框拉大。 10→ 11→- **寬屏**：1400px。寫代碼、看大表，視野全開。 12→- **專注**：800px。沉浸閱讀，心無旁儐。 13→- **隨意**：拖動滑塊，你覺得多寬舒服，就多寬。 14→ 15→## 掌控 16→ 17→點插件圖標，進控制台。 18→ 19→- **滾動**：自然順滑，還是經典手感？ 20→- **位置**：時間軸放哪順手，就放哪。 21→- **視覺特效**：可切換 `飄雪`、`櫻花`、`雨`，給頁面加一點氛圍感。 22→ 23→## 氛圍感 24→ 25→Voyager 不只是在做效率增強，也允許你順手把頁面氣質調對。 26→ 27→- **飄雪**：輕柔雪花緩慢飄落，適合安靜閱讀。 28→- **櫻花**：花瓣自然飄散，頁面會更輕盈。 29→- **雨**：電影感雨絲與細微水花，整體更有沉浸感。 30→- **平滑切換**：關閉特效或切換到另一種效果時，粒子會自然退場，不會突然消失。 31→ 32→
33→

1→# 思うがままに 2→ 3→デフォルトも優れていますが、私たちは完璧を求めます。 4→あなたの環境は、あなた好みに整えましょう。 5→ 6→## シネマモード 7→ 8→ドアの隙間から世界を覗く必要はありません。 9→チャットボックスを広げましょう。 10→ 11→- **ワイドスクリーン**: 1400px。コードを書いたり、大きな表を見たり、視界を全開に。 12→- **集中モード**: 800px。読書に没頭し、余計なものを排除。 13→- **フリースタイル**: スライダーをドラッグして、一番心地よい幅を見つけてください。 14→ 15→## コントロール 16→ 17→拡張機能のアイコンをクリックして、コントロールパネルへ。 18→ 19→- **スクロール**: 自然な滑らかさか、クラシックな感触か？ 20→- **配置**: タイムラインは右利き用？ 左利き用？ 使いやすい場所に。 21→- **ビジュアルエフェクト**: `雪`、`桜`、`雨` から季節の雰囲気を選べます。 22→ 23→## アトモスフィア 24→ 25→Voyager は効率化だけでなく、ページの気分を変えることもできます。 26→ 27→- **雪**: やわらかな雪の結晶がゆっくり舞い落ちる、穏やかな冬の雰囲気。 28→- **桜**: 花びらが自然に舞い散る、軽やかな春の雰囲気。 29→- **雨**: 斜めの雨筋と微かな水しぶきが映画的な臨場感を演出。 30→- **スムーズな切り替え**: エフェクトをオフにしたり切り替えたりすると、パーティクルは自然に退場。 31→ 32→
33→
34→

設定を開く

35→ 36→
37→
38→

視界を調整

1→# 나만의 것으로 만들기 2→ 3→기본 환경도 훌륭합니다. 하지만 당신은 완벽함을 원할 수도 있죠. 4→모든 세부 사항을 맞춤 설정하세요. 5→ 6→## 시네마 모드 (Cinema Mode) 7→ 8→왜 미래를 작은 바늘구멍을 통해 보나요? 9→Voyager를 사용하면 대화창 너비를 확장할 수 있습니다. 10→ 11→- **넓게 (Wide)**: 코딩이나 복잡한 표를 볼 때 적합한 1400px. 12→- **집중 (Focused)**: 읽기에 적합한 800px. 13→- **당신의 결정**: 슬라이더를 사용하여 당신에게 딱 맞는 너비를 찾으세요. 14→ 15→## 컨트롤 (Control) 16→ 17→확장 프로그램 아이콘을 클릭하여 컨트롤 센터에 접속하세요. 18→ 19→- **스크롤 모드**: 자연스러운 방식 또는 클래식 방식. 20→- **타임라인 위치**: 당신이 편안하게 느끼는 곳에 두세요. 21→- **시각 효과**: `눈`, `벚꽃`, `비`로 계절 분위기를 연출하세요. 22→ 23→## 분위기 24→ 25→Voyager는 효율 향상에만 그치지 않습니다. 페이지의 분위기도 바꿀 수 있습니다. 26→ 27→- **눈**: 부드러운 눈송이가 천천히 내려 차분한 겨울 느낌을 줍니다. 28→- **벚꽃**: 벚꽃 잎이 자연스럽게 흩날리며 가벼운 봄 분위기를 연출합니다. 29→- **비**: 비스듬한 빗줄기와 은은한 물방울이 시네마틱한 몰입감을 줍니다. 30→- **부드러운 전환**: 효과를 끄거나 전환하면 파티클이 자연스럽게 사라집니다. 31→ 32→
33→
34→

설정 열기

너비 조절

1→# Appropriez-le-vous 2→ 3→L'expérience par défaut est géniale. Mais vous pourriez la vouloir parfaite. 4→Personnalisez chaque pixel. 5→ 6→## Mode Cinéma 7→ 8→Pourquoi voir le futur à travers un petit trou de serrure ? 9→Voyager vous permet d'étendre la largeur du chat. 10→ 11→- **Large** : 1400px pour le codage et les tableaux complexes. 12→- **Concentré** : 800px pour la lecture. 13→- **Vous décidez** : Utilisez le curseur pour trouver votre point idéal. 14→ 15→## Contrôle 16→ 17→Cliquez sur l'icône de l'extension pour accéder au centre de contrôle. 18→ 19→- **Mode de Défilement** : Naturel ou classique. 20→- **Position de la Chronologie** : Mettez-la où cela semble juste. 21→- **Effets Visuels** : Choisissez `Neige`, `Sakura` ou `Pluie` pour une atmosphère saisonnière. 22→ 23→## Atmosphère 24→ 25→Voyager ne se limite pas aux améliorations utilitaires. Vous pouvez aussi changer l'ambiance de la page. 26→ 27→- **Neige** : Flocons doux dérivant pour une sensation hivernale calme. 28→- **Sakura** : Pétales de fleurs de cerisier flottants pour une ambiance printanière plus légère. 29→- **Pluie** : Une couche de pluie cinématique avec des traînées obliques et de subtiles éclaboussures. 30→- **Transition douce** : En désactivant ou changeant d'effet, les particules s'estompent naturellement. 31→ 32→
33→
34→

Ouvrir les Paramètres

35→ 36→
37→
38→

Ajuster la Largeur

39→ 40→
41→
42→

1→# A Tu Gusto 2→ 3→Lo predeterminado ya es bueno. Pero queremos la perfección. 4→Tu territorio, tus reglas. 5→ 6→## Modo Cine 7→ 8→¿Por qué mirar el mundo a través de una rendija? 9→Haz el cuadro de chat más grande. 10→ 11→- **Pantalla Ancha**: 1400px. Escribir código, ver tablas grandes, visión completa. 12→- **Enfoque**: 800px. Lectura inmersiva, sin distracciones. 13→- **Libre**: Arrastra el control deslizante, tan ancho como te sientas cómodo. 14→ 15→## Control 16→ 17→Haz clic en el icono de la extensión, entra en la consola. 18→ 19→- **Desplazamiento**: ¿Natural y suave, o sensación clásica? 20→- **Posición**: Coloca la línea de tiempo donde te resulte más cómodo. 21→- **Efectos Visuales**: Elige `Nieve`, `Sakura` o `Lluvia` para una atmósfera estacional. 22→ 23→## Atmósfera 24→ 25→Voyager no se limita a mejoras de utilidad. También puedes cambiar el ambiente de la página. 26→ 27→- **Nieve**: Copos suaves a la deriva para una sensación invernal tranquila. 28→- **Sakura**: Pétalos de flor de cerezo flotantes para un toque primaveral más ligero. 29→- **Lluvia**: Una capa de lluvia cinematográfica con líneas inclinadas y sutiles salpicaduras. 30→- **Cambio suave**: Al desactivar un efecto o cambiar a otro, las partículas se desvanecen naturalmente. 31→ 32→
33→
34→

Abrir Configuración

35→ 36→
37→

Ajustar Vista

1→# Largura do Chat 2→ 3→Utilize totalmente o seu monitor ultrawide. 4→ 5→O Gemini™ restringe o conteúdo principal a uma largura fixa. O Voyager liberta isso. 6→Aceda ao painel de definições e arraste o slider **"Largura do Chat"**. 7→ 8→- **Alargar**: Perfeito para tabelas de código, análise de dados e janelas de ecrã dividido. 9→- **Concentrar**: Estreite-o para leitura profunda sem distrações. 10→ 11→
12→ 13→
14→ 15→## Efeitos Visuais 16→ 17→Escolha `Neve`, `Sakura` ou `Chuva` para uma atmosfera sazonal. 18→ 19→O Voyager não se limita a melhorias utilitárias. Pode também mudar o ambiente da página. 20→ 21→- **Neve**: Flocos suaves para uma sensação calma de inverno. 22→- **Sakura**: Pétalas de flor de cerejeira flutuando para um toque primaveril mais leve. 23→- **Chuva**: Uma camada de chuva cinematográfica com gotas inclinadas e salpicos subtis. 24→- **Transição suave**: Ao desativar ou trocar de efeito, as partículas desaparecem naturalmente. 25→

1→# Сделайте его своим 2→ 3→Стандартный опыт великолепен. Но вы можете захотеть, чтобы он был идеальным. 4→Настройте каждый пиксель. 5→ 6→## Режим кинотеатра 7→ 8→Зачем смотреть в будущее через крошечную замочную скважину? 9→Voyager позволяет расширить ширину чата. 10→ 11→- **Широкий**: 1400px для кодирования и сложных таблиц. 12→- **Сфокусированный**: 800px для чтения. 13→- **Решать вам**: Используйте ползунок, чтобы найти свою золотую середину. 14→ 15→## Управление 16→ 17→Нажмите значок расширения, чтобы получить доступ к центру управления. 18→ 19→- **Режим прокрутки**: Естественный или классический. 20→- **Позиция таймлайна**: Поместите его там, где вам удобно. 21→- **Визуальные эффекты**: Выберите `Снег`, `Сакура` или `Дождь` для сезонной атмосферы. 22→ 23→## Атмосфера 24→ 25→Voyager не ограничивается утилитарными улучшениями. Вы также можете изменить настроение страницы. 26→ 27→- **Снег**: Мягкие снежинки для спокойной зимней атмосферы. 28→- **Сакура**: Парящие лепестки вишни для лёгкого весеннего настроения. 29→- **Дождь**: Кинематографический дождь с косыми каплями и лёгкими брызгами. 30→- **Плавное переключение**: При отключении или смене эффекта частицы плавно исчезают. 31→ 32→
33→
34→

Открыть настройки

37→
38→

Настройка ширины

1→# عرض الدردشة 2→ 3→استخدم شاشتك العريضة بالكامل. 4→ 5→يقوم Gemini™ بتقييد المحتوى الرئيسي بعرض ثابت. يقوم Voyager بتحرير ذلك. 6→انتقل إلى لوحة الإعدادات واسحب شريط تمرير **"عرض الدردشة"**. 7→ 8→- **توسيع**: مثالي جداول الكود، وتحليل البيانات، والنوافذ المقسمة. 9→- **تركيز**: قم بتضييقه للقراءة العميقة دون تشتيت. 10→ 11→
12→ 13→
14→ 15→## التأثيرات البصرية 16→ 17→اختر `ثلج` أو `ساكورا` أو `مطر` لأجواء موسمية. 18→ 19→Voyager لا يقتصر على التحسينات العملية. يمكنك أيضاً تغيير مزاج الصفحة. 20→ 21→- **ثلج**: رقاقات ثلج ناعمة لإحساس شتوي هادئ. 22→- **ساكورا**: بتلات أزهار الكرز لأجواء ربيعية أخف. 23→- **مطر**: طبقة مطر سينمائية بخطوط مائلة وقطرات خفيفة. 24→- **التبديل السلس**: عند إيقاف التأثير أو التبديل لآخر، تتلاشى الجسيمات بشكل طبيعي. 25→

## 自訂排序

控制台裡的功能區塊太多，常用的被埋在下面？

滑鼠懸停在任意功能卡片上，右上角會出現 ▲/▼ 按鈕。點一下，卡片就會上移或下移。調整後的順序自動保存，下次打開還是你的佈局。

## 氛圍感

input.new_string:
## カスタム並び替え

ポップアップの設定項目が多すぎて、よく使うものが下に埋もれていませんか？

設定カードにマウスを合わせると、右上に ▲/▼ ボタンが表示されます。クリックでカードを上下に移動でき、並び順は自動保存されます。

## アトモスフィア

팝업에 설정 항목이 너무 많아 자주 쓰는 것이 아래에 묻혀 있나요?

설정 카드에 마우스를 올리면 오른쪽 상단에 ▲/▼ 버튼이 나타납니다. 클릭하면 카드가 위아래로 이동하며, 순서는 자동 저장됩니다.

## 분위기

14→ 15→## ترتيب مخصص 16→ 17→هل يوجد أقسام كثيرة في النافذة المنبثقة والأقسام التي تستخدمها أكثر مدفونة في الأسفل؟ 18→ 19→مرر الماوس فوق أي بطاقة إعدادات وستظهر أزرار ▲/▼ في الزاوية العلوية اليمنى. انقر لتحريك البطاقة لأعلى أو لأسفل. يتم حفظ ترتيبك تلقائيًا. 20→ 21→## التأثيرات البصرية 22→ 23→اختر `ثلج` أو `ساكورا` أو `مطر` لأجواء موسمية. 24→ 25→Voyager لا يقتصر على التحسينات العملية. يمكنك أيضاً تغيير مزاج الصفحة. 26→ 27→- **ثلج**: رقاقات ثلج ناعمة لإحساس شتوي هادئ. 28→- **ساكورا**: بتلات أزهار الكرز لأجواء ربيعية أخف. 29→- **مطر**: طبقة مطر سينمائية بخطوط مائلة وقطرات خفيفة. 30→- **التبديل السلس**: عند إيقاف التأثير أو التبديل لآخر، تتلاشى الجسيمات بشكل طبيعي. 31→

1→# Largura do Chat 2→ 3→Utilize totalmente o seu monitor ultrawide. 4→ 5→O Gemini™ restringe o conteúdo principal a uma largura fixa. O Voyager liberta isso. 6→Aceda ao painel de definições e arraste o slider **"Largura do Chat"**. 7→ 8→- **Alargar**: Perfeito para tabelas de código, análise de dados e janelas de ecrã dividido. 9→- **Concentrar**: Estreite-o para leitura profunda sem distrações. 10→ 11→
12→ 13→
14→ 15→## Ordem personalizada 16→ 17→Muitas seções no popup e as que você mais usa estão lá embaixo? 18→ 19→Passe o mouse sobre qualquer cartão de configuração e os botões ▲/▼ aparecerão no canto superior direito. Clique para mover um cartão para cima ou para baixo. Sua disposição é salva automaticamente. 20→ 21→## Efeitos Visuais 22→ 23→Escolha `Neve`, `Sakura` ou `Chuva` para uma atmosfera sazonal. 24→ 25→O Voyager não se limita a melhorias utilitárias. Pode também mudar o ambiente da página. 26→ 27→- **Neve**: Flocos suaves para uma sensação calma de inverno. 28→- **Sakura**: Pétalas de flor de cerejeira flutuando para um toque primaveril mais leve. 29→- **Chuva**: Uma camada de chuva cinematográfica com gotas inclinadas e salpicos subtis. 30→- **Transição suave**: Ao desativar ou trocar de efeito, as partículas desaparecem naturalmente. 31→

## Main VitePress Changelog

The official VitePress changelog documents updates including handling of CRLF in snippet plugin and the use of Vite 7. Recent updates were documented as of February 6, 2026.

## Popular VitePress Changelog Plugins

**Git-based Changelog Plugin:**
The @nolebase/vitepress-plugin-git-changelog is a tool that generates changelogs and contributor lists, seamlessly integrating them into your VitePress site. The latest version available is 2.18.2, last published 6 months ago.

- The vitepress-demo-plugin has recent fixes for code block styles and component rendering issues.

These plugins provide various enhancements for VitePress documentation sites, with active maintenance and updates through early 2026.

Based on the search results, here are the key findings about VitePress git changelog display commits history plugins:

## Primary Plugin: @nolebase/vitepress-plugin-git-changelog

The @nolebase/vitepress-plugin-git-changelog plugin is a tool that generates changelogs and contributor lists, seamlessly integrating them into your VitePress site. 

**Key Features:**

- Git logs are all you need with no service fees, online databases, or additional setup required.
- It includes build-time generation of changelog and contributors sections and is customizable to configure author name alias, email alias, display name mapping, etc.
- The Git-based page histories plugin comes with many options to customize, including contributors info and display texts.

**Package Information:**

This is a VitePress plugin that adds a changelog fetched from git to your documentation, with the latest version being 2.18.2.

## Alternative Plugin

The vitepress-plugin-changelog package provides functionality to display the change history and personnel of *.md documents by getting changelog and contributor information.

## VuePress Git Plugin

For VuePress (related but different), there's a git plugin that collects Git information for your pages, including creation and update timestamps, contributor lists, and changelogs, with the lastUpdated and contributors features in the default theme being powered by this plugin.

input.prompt: Extract the key features, installation steps, and configuration examples for this VitePress git changelog plugin. What does it display? How to install? What does the UI look like (contributors, commit history on each page)?

content.content:
# VitePress Git Changelog Plugin Summary

## Key Features

The plugin generates automatic changelogs and contributor lists from git history. Notable capabilities include:

- **No external dependencies**: "Git logs are all you need. No service fees, online databases, or additional setup required."
- Build-time generation without runtime overhead
- Customizable author/email mapping and display names
- Native VitePress design integration
- Accessibility best practices and internationalization support

## What It Displays

The plugin adds two sections to pages:

1. **Contributors**: Shows avatars and GitHub links for those who edited the page
2. **File History**: Displays recent commits with hashes, messages, and PR references

## Installation

The documentation notes that setup requires following detailed steps on the "Getting Started" page, though specific commands aren't provided in this excerpt.

## UI Appearance

Based on the live example shown:
- Contributors appear as clickable avatar cards with usernames
- Changelog displays commit hashes (truncated), commit messages, and issue/PR links

Live implementations are visible on documentation sites for Nólëbase, Vue Macros, and several others.

toolUseResult.result:
# VitePress Git Changelog Plugin Summary

## Key Features

The plugin generates automatic changelogs and contributor lists from git history. Notable capabilities include:

- **No external dependencies**: "Git logs are all you need. No service fees, online databases, or additional setup required."
- Build-time generation without runtime overhead
- Customizable author/email mapping and display names
- Native VitePress design integration
- Accessibility best practices and internationalization support

## What It Displays

The plugin adds two sections to pages:

1. **Contributors**: Shows avatars and GitHub links for those who edited the page
2. **File History**: Displays recent commits with hashes, messages, and PR references

## Installation

The documentation notes that setup requires following detailed steps on the "Getting Started" page, though specific commands aren't provided in this excerpt.

## UI Appearance

Based on the live example shown:
- Contributors appear as clickable avatar cards with usernames
- Changelog displays commit hashes (truncated), commit messages, and issue/PR links
- Shows "Last edited [timeframe] ago" with a "View full history" option
- Clean, minimal design matching VitePress aesthetics

Live implementations are visible on documentation sites for Nólëbase, Vue Macros, and several others.

content.text:
VitePress **本身不内置** changelog 组件，但有一个非常成熟的社区插件：

---

### [@nolebase/vitepress-plugin-git-changelog](https://nolebase-integrations.ayaka.io/pages/en/integrations/vitepress-plugin-git-changelog/)

这是目前最流行的方案。它从 git 历史自动生成每个页面底部的：

1. **Contributors** — 编辑过该页面的作者头像 + GitHub 链接
2. **File History** — 该文件的 commit 记录（hash、message、PR 链接、时间）

**特点**：
- 纯 git 驱动，零外部服务
- 构建时生成，无运行时开销
- 支持 i18n、作者别名映射
- UI 风格与 VitePress 原生设计一致

**安装**：
```bash
bun add @nolebase/vitepress-plugin-git-changelog -D
```

**配置** (`.vitepress/config.mts` + `.vitepress/theme/index.ts`)：
```ts
// config.mts
import { GitChangelog } from '@nolebase/vitepress-plugin-git-changelog/vite'

export default defineConfig({
  vite: {
    plugins: [
      GitChangelog({ repoURL: 'https://github.com/Nagi-ovo/gemini-voyager' }),
    ],
  },
})
```
```ts
// theme/index.ts
import { NolebaseGitChangelogPlugin } from '@nolebase/vitepress-plugin-git-changelog/client'
import '@nolebase/vitepress-plugin-git-changelog/client/style.css'

export default {
  enhanceApp({ app }) {
    app.use(NolebaseGitChangelogPlugin)
  },
}
```

---

不过，如果你的需求不是"每个页面显示 git 历史"，而是想做一个**产品级 changelog 页面**（类似 `What's New`，按版本展示功能更新），那这个插件不合适——那种场景通常就是手写一个 `changelog.md`，或者用你项目已有的 `src/pages/content/changelog/notes/*.md` 文件生成。

你想实现哪种？

Sources:
- [Git-based page histories | Nólëbase Integrations](https://nolebase-integrations.ayaka.io/pages/en/integrations/vitepress-plugin-git-changelog/)
- [@nolebase/vitepress-plugin-git-changelog - npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@nolebase/vitepress-plugin-git-changelog)
- [VitePress Last Updated](https://vitepress.dev/reference/default-theme-last-updated)

Based on the search results, here's what I found about VitePress search plugins, local search options, and Algolia alternatives for 2025:

## VitePress Search Options

VitePress supports searching your docs site using Algolia DocSearch, or you can use community plugins like vitepress-plugin-search, vitepress-plugin-pagefind, @orama/plugin-vitepress, and vitepress-plugin-typesense.

## Local Search & Pagefind

The vitepress-plugin-pagefind offers a similar UI as Algolia and provides local search functionality. This is a popular choice for those wanting offline or local search without relying on external services.

## Algolia Alternatives

For search solutions beyond Algolia, there are several options:

**Specialized for Documentation:**
- Orama offers plugins for popular platforms like Vitepress and Docusaurus, with a self-hostable open-source version for customization and control
- Typesense is available via the vitepress-plugin-typesense

**Open Source Options:**
- Open-source tools like Meilisearch, Typesense, and ElasticSearch are free to use
- Typesense is an open-source search engine with a focus on simplicity and speed, commonly used by startups looking for an easy drop-in replacement for Algolia

**Vector Database Options:**
- Pinecone is a popular vector database that enables semantic search by storing embeddings, often used as a building block for retrieval-augmented generation or search

The choice depends on your specific needs—whether you need local/offline search, semantic search capabilities, or a fully hosted solution.

content.text: EAGAIN 是因为同时 spawn 太多 git 进程。这个插件有 `maxGitLogCount` 或并发限制选项。让我查一下。

input.prompt: Find the configuration options for GitChangelog vite plugin. I need to know about maxConcurrentProcesses, maxGitLogCount, or any option that limits parallel git processes to avoid EAGAIN errors. List all available options with their types and defaults.

content.content:
# GitChangelog Plugin Configuration Options

Based on the documentation provided, here are the available options for the `GitChangelog` Vite plugin:

## All Available Options

```typescript
interface GitChangelogOptions {
  cwd?: string                           // Current working directory (default: process.cwd())
  include?: string[]                     // Files to include (default: ['**/*.md', '!node_modules'])
  mapAuthors?: Author[]                  // Map contributor information
  repoURL?: string | CommitToStringHandler  // Repository URL (required)
  getReleaseTagURL?: CommitToStringHandler   // Function for release tag URLs
  getReleaseTagsURL?: CommitToStringsHandler // Function for multiple release tags
  getCommitURL?: CommitToStringHandler   // Function for commit URLs
  rewritePathsBy?: RewritePathsBy        // Rules to rewrite paths by patterns
  maxGitLogCount?: number                // Maximum number of git logs to fetch
}
```

## Important Note

The documentation does not mention `maxConcurrentProcesses` as an available configuration option. The only concurrency-related setting documented is `maxGitLogCount`, which "specifies the maximum number of git logs to fetch."

For EAGAIN errors related to parallel git processes, this option may not directly address concurrency limits. You may need to consult additional documentation or the plugin's GitHub repository for advanced performance tuning.

For EAGAIN errors related to parallel git processes, this option may not directly address concurrency limits. You may need to consult additional documentation or the plugin's GitHub repository for advanced performance tuning.

content.text: The plugin uses `Promise.all` on all paths at once (line 286), which spawns too many git processes for large doc sites. The simplest fix is to limit the `include` scope or set `maxGitLogCount`. But the real issue is the number of files. Let me count the doc files:
281 个 md 文件，每个 spawn 一个 git 进程 —— 太多了。限制 `maxGitLogCount` 和缩小 `include` 范围：

content.text:
已完成，两个功能都配好了：

1. **Git Changelog** (`@nolebase/vitepress-plugin-git-changelog`) — 每个文档页面底部自动显示贡献者头像和 commit 历史。`include` 限定为 `docs/guide/**/*.md` 避免 281 个文件并发 git 导致 EAGAIN。

2. **全局搜索** — VitePress 自带的 local search，零依赖，在 `themeConfig.search.provider: 'local'` 开启。打开文档站后按 `Ctrl+K` / `Cmd+K` 即可搜索。不需要 Algolia 那样的第三方服务。
